rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: LayerFlow: layer-wise interlinked embedding projections with uncertainty for LLMs — direct twin of multi-overlay projection-based eval primitive; not stereographic/conformal but same functional role.
Semantic steering of text-embedding projection — projection-based LLM eval/analysis primitive.
t-SNE projection of LLM embeddings + SLERP geometry on representational sphere — adjacent geometric projection primitive.
LLM-as-Judge interval uncertainty; different artefact, no projection mechanism.

kw_matched: conformal (different sense: statistical conformal prediction, not angle-preserving conformal map)
results.note: Conformal prediction is a statistical validity framework; uses the word 'conformal' homonymously but not the geometric conformal-mapping concept of the candidate. Below thresholds.
TensorFlow Embedding Projector: interactive embedding dim-reduction projection tool with selectable methods/overlays — projection-eval primitive widely used for LLM embeddings.
Interpretable scalable LLM eval framework — at threshold for both semantic and functional overlap on interpretable-eval-framework cluster.

fail_reason: 5 results hit thresholds across multiple distinct effect clusters (layer-wise interlinked embedding projection [LayerFlow], semantic steering of embedding projection, representational-geometry projection [t-SNE+SLERP], interactive embedding projector [TF], interpretable LLM eval framework). The candidate's specific stereographic/conformal/invertible mechanism is novel, but its core LLM-side functional role — project LLM embeddings to 2D and overlay regions of interest for evaluation — is well-occupied by existing tools (TF Embedding Projector, LayerFlow) and embedding-projection eval literature. Conformal-prediction overlap at rank 6 is lexical/homonymous (statistical vs geometric) and was scored as no-hit; even excluding it, hits >= 1 triggers FAIL. Disagreement with prior 07_hit_miss.json: I score rank 6 as NO hit (homonym for 'conformal'), giving total_hits=5 vs prior 6; verdict remains FAIL.

disagreements_with_prior_audit.reason: 'Conformal prediction' is a statistical coverage-guarantee framework, not the geometric angle-preserving conformal map in the candidate. The lexical match is a homonym. Semantic cosine of 0.72 in prior seems inflated; on the candidate's intended sense (geometric conformal projection) the cosine is closer to 0.55-0.60.

convergence_with_prior_audit: Both prior 07_hit_miss.json (6 hits) and this verification (5 hits) yield FAIL. Verdict is robust to the rank-6 disagreement.
